# Varden Eldur

> Varden Eldur helps high-ticket local service businesses get found by more qualified buyers across Google Search, Google Maps, AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, and other answer engines.

Primary website: https://www.vardengrowth.com/

## Business facts

- Business name: Varden Eldur
- Category: SEO, Google Maps visibility, answer engine optimization, and generative engine optimization
- Customers: High-ticket local service businesses
- Industries: Tree service companies, HVAC companies, roofers, med spas, dentists, law firms, private clinics, and home service companies
- Service area: Based in Utah and serving the United States
- Phone: (435) 790-4271
- Email: jordan@vardengrowth.com
- Strategy call booking: https://www.vardengrowth.com/strategy-call.html

## Services

- Local SEO foundation
- Google Business Profile and Maps optimization
- Review strategy and citation cleanup
- Service-area page planning
- Industry-specific SEO pages
- Answer-first content
- Structured data and entity optimization
- AI search visibility audits
